series_metadata.series_title: Births, Deaths, and Stillbirth Certificates and Marriage and Divorce Abstracts
series_metadata.series_description: Original birth certificate, death certificate, stillbirth certificate, marriage abstracts, and divorce abstract, and delayed birth certificates. These certificates are in books of 250 each on open shelve, which have to be accessible.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: These records are retained as permanent documents within Division of Vital Statisitics. Death records which are more than old are in State Archives at Ohio Historical Center
